docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, MICHAEL DBA  THE HYDE STREET STUDIOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, MICHAEL DBA  THE HYDE STREET STUDIOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, JOHN $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,640.00, DEFENDANT MAY APPLY FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT.
